location: Not a fixed pickup — random drop from Soldier-class enemies across several regions (Godrick, Raya Lucaria, Radahn, Mausoleum, Leyndell, Haligtree, and Messmer Soldiers); most reliably farmed from crossbow-wielding Godrick Soldiers at Gatefront Ruins in Limgrave
tactics: At Gatefront Ruins, target Godrick Soldiers actually holding a crossbow rather than the spear-and-shield variants — only the crossbow-wielders can drop it
Base drop rate is low (roughly 2% at 100 Discovery), so expect to farm multiple kills; a Discovery-boosting item speeds this up
Most soldiers here ignore you until aggroed, so you can pick off crossbow-wielders individually instead of pulling the whole camp
lore: A crossbow reinforced with iron limbs for extra punch, commonly issued to rank-and-file soldiers during the Shattering.

builds.name: High base-damage ranged poke
builds.why: Highest physical base damage among the standard (non-Somber) crossbows, good for chip damage and stance breaks from range without any stat investment beyond requirements
